title: BlossomCraft Modpack
description: An unofficial Modpack made for play.BlossomCraft.org
body:
This unofficial modpack is designed for BlossomCraft and contains client-side, staff-approved mods. It focuses on optimization, visual improvements, and quality-of-life enhancements. 

# **Features** 

Performance Optimizations - Entity Culling, ImmediatelyFast and others

Visual Enhancements - Iris for shader support combined with Variants CIT for compatibility with BlossomCraft’s custom items

Utility & Quality of Life - Litematica, No Mining Cooldown

Social Mods - Essentials
